Merge annotated expression and metadata

Source: R/merge.R
merge_expr_meta.Rd

Converts the annotated expression matrix to long format, joins it to meta by sample, and optionally writes the merged table as CSV.

Usage

merge_expr_meta(expr_anno, meta, output_file = NULL, value_name = "expression")

Arguments

expr_anno

Annotated expression table returned by annotate_expr().

meta

Checked or user-supplied metadata table with sample first.

output_file

Optional CSV path.

value_name

Name of the expression value column in the long table.

Value

A merged data.frame.

On this page
